title: Migrate JUnit 4 tests to JUnit 5
description: This rule flags all the JUnit 4 annotations that need to be migrated to JUnit 5, helping in the migration of a project.
recommendation: Replace JUnit 4 annotations with their JUnit 5 equivalents.
impact: Improves test maintainability and compatibility with JUnit 5.

checks.message: Replace JUnit 4 annotations with their JUnit 5 equivalents.
